raw_consumer_statement: I received a bill in the mail from The Home Depot/Citi at the end of XXXX or beginning of XXXX. I didn't open an account with them. Someone opened this account fraudulently and charged {$3700.00} worth of flooring in my name. Since then I've spoken to their fraud department trying to prove that I didn't make this purchase. I've sent copy of my driver 's license, a police report and an Identitytheft.gov report detailing this fraud. It seems to be falling on deaf ears! I will be calling again today to find out how the investigation is going. They now have reported my account as being delinquent on my credit report even though there is an open fraud investigation and my local police are also investigating it.
